category_sources: Official mftrace page at https://lilypond.org/download/source/mftrace/ describes scalable PostScript fonts for MetaFont
source_facts.description: Trace TeX bitmap font to PFA, PFB, or TTF font
docs_sources: Official mftrace page provides introduction, requirements, install instructions, and command-line option documentation
repo_sources: Official mftrace page lists GIT at http://repo.or.cz/w/mftrace.git
tags_sources: Official mftrace page describes tracing TeX bitmap fonts into PFA, PFB, and TTF scalable fonts
